name: Arcadian Books and Prints
content: I love this place. Literal floor to ceiling books, and even more books in between. I have never seen more books in a smaller space. There was an older man quietly reading a book in the corner who I hope is the owner, because I paid him for some post cards that I picked up. It is a really cool spot near Jackson Square and I would highly recommend going. Travel here with a partner: if you lose your balance here, you will need someone to help excavate you from the pile of books that will topple on you.
